detail.title: Document Detail
detail.processingHint: OCR, extraction and AI analysis in progress.
detail.failedHint: The document could not be processed.
detail.bookedHint: The journal entry has been created.

bookingSuggestion.title: AI Booking Suggestion
bookingSuggestion.rejectConfirm: Are you sure you want to reject this suggestion?

partnerAssignment.title: Partner Assignment
partnerAssignment.fuzzyMatchHint: AI suggests this partner based on a fuzzy match. Please confirm or select a different one.

reviewReasons.lowExtractionHint: AI could not confidently extract data. Please review manually.
reviewReasons.lowBookingHint: Booking suggestion has low confidence. Please check accounts.
reviewReasons.fuzzyPartnerHint: Please confirm or manually assign partner.
reviewReasons.bookingFailedHint: AI could not create suggestion. Manual booking required.
reviewReasons.unresolvedAccountsHint: Suggested account numbers could not be matched.
reviewReasons.azureFailedHint: Azure analysis failed. Standard OCR + AI pipeline was used instead.
reviewReasons.azureLowConfidenceHint: Azure returned low confidence results. Standard pipeline was used as fallback.

delete.title: Delete Document
delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{{fileName}}"?
delete.closedPeriod: The associated journal entry is in a closed fiscal period ({{period}}).
delete.willDeleteDocument: The document and its file will be permanently removed
delete.willDeleteBookingSuggestion: The booking suggestion will be deleted
delete.willReverseJournalEntry: The associated journal entry will be reversed (a reversal entry will be created)
delete.journalEntryAlreadyReversed: The associated journal entry has already been reversed

dropzone.idle: Drag & drop a file here, or click to select
